data.revised_prompt: cinematic realistic watercolor book illustration, professional visual for a Chinese 30-minute book-summary video, quiet Kamakura and Izu Oshima atmosphere, Japanese seaside town, camellia flowers, paper letters, fountain pens, warm natural film lighting, detailed environment, emotional healing tone, soft but rich colors, storybook realism, consistent art direction across a 24-image sequence, 16:9, no readable text, no logo, no watermark. Main protagonist: one East Asian woman in her early 30s, shoulder-length black hair, soft cream cardigan, calm tired eyes. Mother: East Asian woman in her late 50s with short grey hair and muted green cardigan, clearly older than the protagonist. Daughter: teenage East Asian girl with school uniform and ponytail, clearly much younger. When a scene includes multiple people, make them different ages, different clothes, different hairstyles, different faces. Scene 10/24, story beat: Camellia island road. Composition: winter island road lined with camellia trees, fallen red petals on dark volcanic soil, the protagonist walks alone under a pale sky, the wooden box wrapped in cloth under her arm. People rule: single protagonist only. Keep this image narratively connected to the nearby subtitle meaning, but do not draw readable words: 鸠子一开始以为自己能够完成可后来她发现事情没有那么简单优秀的代笔人不是把句子写得漂亮而是要让委托人的心准确地出现在纸上若不能抵达那颗心再华丽的文字也只是空壳这个认知让鸠子陷入停滞四月来了阳菜穿着略显肥大的新校服升入高中小梅和莲太朗也开始读小学二年级海水依旧寒冷蜜朗却频繁去海边冲浪全家似乎都在向前只有
